description: A designed square 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest card in the standard template. Background is the recurring high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands locked in metal handcuffs, with a dark gradient on the left side. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/13/2025 | Houston, TX'. Red diagonal corner banner top-right reads 'HOUSTON'. Large bold white name at mid-left: 'Rogelio Hernandez'. Bold white 'CRIME:' label with bullet 'Aggravated child sexual assault'. Bottom-left round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right red box '-THE- WORST FIRST'. Generic stock handcuffs image substitutes for a mugshot. Propaganda technique: a particularly inflammatory child-sex-crime charge attached to a named alien and a city tag to provoke outrage and justify removal. Target audience: general public and local Texas media.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/13/2025 | Houston, TX; Rogelio Hernandez; CRIME: Aggravated child sexual assault; HOUSTON; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
